title: Founders Fund launches game show starring Sam Altman, Palmer Luckey, and other tech elites
summary: Founders Fund launched a game show featuring prominent tech entrepreneurs including Sam Altman and Palmer Luckey, moderated by the firm's chief marketing officer. The debut episode brought together current technology industry leaders for conversation.
content: The debut episode, moderated by Founders Fund chief marketing officer Mike Solana, included a star-studded cast of current tech luminaries.

zh.title: Founders Fund推出游戏节目，由Sam Altman、Palmer Luckey等科技精英主演
zh.summary: Founders Fund推出了一档游戏节目，汇集了包括Sam Altman和Palmer Luckey在内的著名科技企业家，由该公司首席营销官主持。首集节目汇聚了当前科技行业的领袖人物进行对话。
